scripts.build:bundle: bun run sync:codex-version && mkdir -p dist && bun build ./src/entrypoint-main.ts ./src/entrypoint-local-test.ts ./src/entrypoint-updater.ts ./src/entrypoint-worker.ts ./src/entrypoint-mcp-proxy.ts --outdir dist --target bun --sourcemap
scripts.build:exe: bun run prepare:matrix-crypto && bun run sync:codex-version && mkdir -p bin && bun build --compile --outfile bin/sandy --sourcemap ./src/entrypoint-main.ts
scripts.build:exe:updater: bun run sync:codex-version && mkdir -p bin && bun build --compile --outfile bin/sandy-updater --sourcemap ./src/entrypoint-updater.ts
scripts.build:exe:worker: bun run sync:codex-version && mkdir -p bin && bun build --compile --outfile bin/sandy-worker --sourcemap ./src/entrypoint-worker.ts
scripts.build:exe:mcp: bun run sync:codex-version && mkdir -p bin && bun build --compile --outfile bin/sandy-mcp-sidecar --sourcemap ./src/entrypoint-mcp-proxy.ts
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build:bundle && bun run knip
scripts.start: bun run sync:codex-version && bun run src/entrypoint-main.ts
scripts.start:local-test: bun run sync:codex-version && bun run src/entrypoint-local-test.ts
